function getCenteredPosition(size){return{x:Math.max(0,Math.round((window.innerWidth-size.w)/2)),y:Math.max(0,Math.round((window.innerHeight-size.h)/2))};}function clampToViewport(p,size){const maxX=Math.max(0,window.innerWidth-size.w);const maxY=Math.max(0,window.innerHeight-size.h);return{x:Math.min(Math.max(0,p.x),maxX),y:Math.min(Math.max(0,p.y),maxY)};}function safeGet(key){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||"null");}catch{return null;}}function safeSet(key,value){try{localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(value));}catch{}}function getIconUrl(icon){return /^https?:\/\//i.test(icon)?icon:`/icons/corporations/${icon}`;}function badgeTone(stock){if(typeof stock!=="number")return"neutral";if(stock<=0)return"danger";if(stock<=5)return"warn";return"success";}function avatarUrl(figure){return`/avatarimage?figure=${encodeURIComponent(figure)}&size=b&headonly=0&gesture=sml`;}function groupMembersByRank(members){const byRank=new Map();for(const m of members){if(!byRank.has(m.rankId)){byRank.set(m.rankId,{rankId:m.rankId,rankName:m.rankName,rankOrder:m.rankOrder,pay:m.pay,members:[]});}byRank.get(m.rankId).members.push(m);}return Array.from(byRank.values()).sort((a,b)=>b.rankOrder-a.rankOrder);}export default CorporationsView;
